description: Canonical page inventory for the IPAFFS CHED-D (HRFNAO) journey, deduplicated from 22 extracted trace timelines and reconciled against the ipaffs-qa-automation CHED-D workflow + accessibility spec (authoritative page names + intended order).

pages.name: Notifications dashboard
pages.conditional: always (journey entry point; also hosts search, NEW-status check, copy-as-new and amend/delete lifecycle actions on result rows)

evidence.note: click 'Create a new notification' from the dashboard
dashboard keyword search + NEW status verification on result row
copy-as-new-<ref> button on a dashboard result row (clone lifecycle)

pages.name: Import notification type
pages.conditional: always; radio 'High risk food and feed of non-animal origin' is what selects the CHED-D variant

evidence.note: check radio 'High risk food and feed of non-animal origin'

pages.name: Country of origin
pages.conditional: always

evidence.note: select country of origin (value AF / Afghanistan)

pages.name: Origin of the import
pages.conditional: always; single 'Save and continue' interstitial (no user input observed in traces)

evidence.note: Save and continue past origin-of-import interstitial

pages.name: Search commodities (enter commodity code)
pages.conditional: always

pages.name: Commodity basic description
pages.conditional: always; Yes/No — 'No' (single commodity) taken in all traces; 'Yes' branch not exercised

pages.name: About the consignment (purpose)
pages.conditional: always; 'Internal market' shows only the radio, 'Non-internal market' additionally reveals Point of exit + exit date/time fields on the same page

evidence.note: Non-internal market variant: fill 'Point of exit' (extra fields on this page)

pages.name: Notification hub (task list)
pages.conditional: always; task-list hub returned to between commodity/address sub-journeys (spoke links: Commodity, Add a consignor, Add a consignee)

evidence.note: click 'Commodity' task link from the hub

pages.name: Commodity details (weight, packages, gross weight)
pages.conditional: always

pages.name: Commodity additional details (foodstuff/feedingstuff and storage temperature)
pages.conditional: always; Feedingstuff/Foodstuff and Ambient/Chilled/Frozen radios

pages.name: Accompanying documents
pages.conditional: always; document type + reference + document date, then 'Add attachment' opens the upload sub-page

pages.name: Document upload
pages.conditional: shown when adding an attachment to an accompanying document; sets the file then 'Next' returns to accompanying-documents

evidence.note: set input files on the file upload

pages.name: Traders addresses (consignor, consignee, importer and place of destination)
pages.conditional: always; hub page re-entered for consignor, consignee, then importer + place of destination populated inline (#populate-importer, #populate-place-of-destination)

pages.name: Search existing consignor or exporter
pages.conditional: shown from the 'Add a consignor or exporter' link; can pick an existing party or 'Create a new consignor or exporter'

evidence.note: click 'Create a new consignor or exporter'
click 'Create a new consignor or exporter'

pages.name: Create consignor or exporter
pages.conditional: shown when creating a new consignor; full address form (name, address lines, city, postcode, phone, country, email)

evidence.note: fill 'City or town' on consignor form

pages.name: Consignor confirmation (add to notification)
pages.conditional: confirmation summary of the created consignor; 'Add to notification' attaches it

pages.name: Search existing consignee
pages.conditional: shown from the 'Add a consignee' link; existing party or 'Create a new consignee'

pages.name: Create consignee
pages.conditional: shown when creating a new consignee; full address form ('Consignee name' + address block)

evidence.note: fill 'City or town' on consignee form

pages.name: Consignee confirmation (add to notification)
pages.conditional: confirmation summary of the created consignee; 'Add to notification' attaches it

pages.name: Transport to the port of entry
pages.conditional: always; port of entry (autocomplete), means of transport, transport ID + document reference, and arrival date/time. Arrival date must be within 5 days past to 120 days future (validation error state exercised).

evidence.note: select means of transport / port autocomplete + arrival date fields
ERROR STATE: arrival date >5 days past shows 'You cannot enter a date more than 5 days in the past or 120 days in the future'

pages.name: Goods movement services (Common Transit Convention / transport service)
pages.conditional: always; 'Are you using the Common Transit Convention?' + 'Will the transport use the [GVMS/CHEF] service?'. Answering the Common User Charge branch here triggers the downstream CUC billing pages.

evidence.note: check 'No' to 'Will the transport use the service'

pages.name: Contact details
pages.conditional: always; pre-populated in traces (only 'Save and continue' observed)

evidence.note: Save and continue past contact details

pages.name: Nominated contacts (optional)
pages.conditional: always; optional — traces skip through with 'Save and continue'

evidence.note: Save and continue past nominated contacts

pages.name: Contact address for consignment (branch address entry)
pages.conditional: always; entry page offering 'add a new branch address' (or pick an existing one)

pages.name: Create branch address
pages.conditional: shown when creating a new branch address; full address form ('Branch address name' + address block)

evidence.note: fill 'City or town' on branch address form
fill 'Address line 1' on branch address form

pages.name: Branch address confirmation (return to notification)
pages.conditional: confirmation of the saved branch address; 'Return to notification' then re-lands on contact-address which is saved through

pages.name: Review your notification
pages.conditional: always; summary of all entered data before declaration

pages.name: Declaration (submit notification)
pages.conditional: always; declaration then 'Submit notification'

pages.name: Import notification sent (confirmation with CHED reference)
pages.conditional: always; shows the generated CHED reference (CHEDD.GB.YYYY.NNNNNNN) in #reference-number

pages.name: Confirm billing details (Common User Charge)
pages.conditional: CUC (Common User Charge) notifications only; slots between branch-address and review. Summary with 'Change address' / 'Change email' links + Save and continue.

pages.name: Find billing address (postcode lookup and select)
pages.conditional: CUC only; enter postcode, 'Find address', then select from the address dropdown and Continue

evidence.note: select the billing address from the results dropdown

pages.name: Billing contact details (email and phone)
pages.conditional: CUC only; billing contact email + phone number

pages.name: Assess consignments / BIP notifications search (inspector)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector (decision) app; search by keyword or CHED number then open the CHED

evidence.note: fill 'Keywords or CHED number' and search

pages.name: Decision hub (consignment overview / task list)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; overview with Checks / Laboratory tests / Decision spoke links

pages.name: Consignment checks (documentary / identity / physical)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; documentary, identity and physical check checkboxes with satisfactory/not-satisfactory outcomes

pages.name: Laboratory tests required (Yes/No)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; 'Yes' opens the lab-test sub-journey

pages.name: Select commodity to test
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; pick which commodity line to sample

evidence.note: click 'Select' for the commodity to test

pages.name: Choose laboratory test (search and select)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; search the test catalogue (e.g. MACROLIDES) and choose a test

evidence.note: search lab test then choose result 0

pages.name: Laboratory sample details
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; laboratory, sample reference, number of samples, sample type, storage temperature

pages.name: Record laboratory test information (results and outcome)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; sample use-by date, released date, test method, results, Satisfactory/Not satisfactory

pages.name: Laboratory tests review
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; review recorded tests then 'Save and return'

evidence.note: click 'Save and return' from lab tests review

pages.name: Record decision outcome (date/time and submit)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; decision date/time then 'Submit decision' (Acceptable / Not acceptable outcomes)

pages.name: Decision submitted confirmation (view or print CHED)
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; confirmation with 'View or print CHED' link

pages.name: Record decision — status verification
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector; re-search and open the CHED to verify #Status-Label reflects the recorded decision

evidence.note: fill 'Keywords or CHED number' to re-open and verify status

pages.name: Inspector attachments upload
pages.conditional: post-submission, inspector document feature; document type + reference + date + file, with valid/invalid file-type and size validation

notes: PAGE NAMES + INTENDED ORDER are authoritative from ipaffs-qa-automation (accessibility spec walks every create page in order; workflow encodes the same). Where a trace's pageGuess disagreed, the spec name won for naming/order and the trace confirmed what rendered. LINEAR CREATE JOURNEY = orders 0-28 (journeyOrder). VARIANTS: (a) Non-internal market adds Point-of-exit + exit date/time fields to about-the-consignment (order 6), same page; (b) CUC (Common User Charge) inserts the three cuc-* billing pages between branch-address-confirmation and review-notification (order -1, evidence 566993a8 + 1d9ca392); (c) copy-as-new clones an existing CHED from a notifications-dashboard result row back into the create journey (evidence 54f17c action 113). The importer + place of destination are NOT separate pages — they are populated inline on traders-addresses (order 12). ERROR STATES: transport-details arrival-date window (5 days past / 120 days future) is the only field-validation error captured in the CHED-D subset (evidence e95111 action 230; sibling f30f7ca covers the 120-days-future bound). DECISION/INSPECTOR side (orders -1) is a separate app (/decision/...) reached only after submission; included for completeness but out of scope for the new CHED-D create app. GAPS (traces are a lower bound): amend-from-hub (index hash e2fa4486) and delete-notification (index hash dbcdf0d8) lifecycle journeys are in the corpus but were NOT among the 22 extracted timelines, so no actionId evidence is cited — snapshot them separately if their pages are needed. The 'Yes' branch of commodity-basic-description (add more commodity detail) and multi-commodity / split-consignment variants were never exercised in this subset.
